title: clutia tomentosa var. marginata
intro: Clutia tomentosa var. marginata, also known as the Velvet Clutia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clutiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clutia tomentosa var. marginata include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
